stack: LangGraph agent with Postgres checkpoints and a vector store
memoryGoal: Remember customer preferences, product decisions, and reusable workflow lessons across support and implementation sessions.
forbiddenMemory: Do not retain raw credentials, private customer secrets, payment details, or personal contact data beyond explicit support context.
primaryFailure: The agent may recall stale customer requirements or leak private memory across workspaces.
availableMaterials: Staging API key with read-only test data
